question: 1. Insert record into STUDENT (101, RAHUL, 20, MCA)
query: INSERT INTO STUDENT VALUES (101, 'RAHUL', 20, 'MCA');

question: 2. Insert record into EMPLOYEE (201, ANITA, 45000, 10)
query: INSERT INTO EMPLOYEE VALUES (201, 'ANITA', 45000, 10);

question: 3. Insert new department (50, TRAINING, DELHI)
query: INSERT INTO DEPT VALUES (50, 'TRAINING', 'DELHI');

question: 4. Insert into BOOK with specific columns
query: INSERT INTO BOOK (BOOK_ID, TITLE, PRICE) VALUES (501, 'SQL Guide', 450);

question: 5. Insert multiple rows into COURSE
query:
INSERT ALL 
INTO COURSE VALUES (1, 'Java', 6)
INTO COURSE VALUES (2, 'Python', 4)
SELECT * FROM DUAL;

question: 6. Insert into EMP_COPY from EMP
query: INSERT INTO EMP_COPY SELECT * FROM EMP;

question: 7. Insert high salary employees (>3000)
query: INSERT INTO EMP_HIGH_SAL SELECT * FROM EMP WHERE SAL > 3000;

question: 8. Insert employees hired after 1981
query: INSERT INTO EMP_NEW_HIRE SELECT * FROM EMP WHERE HIREDATE > '31-DEC-81';

question: 9. Insert into DEPT_BACKUP
query: INSERT INTO DEPT_BACKUP (DEPTNO, DNAME) SELECT DEPTNO, DNAME FROM DEPT;

question: 10. Insert into EMP_SALARY_RECORD
query: INSERT INTO EMP_SALARY_RECORD (ENAME, SAL) SELECT ENAME, SAL FROM EMP;

question: 11. Update salary of SMITH to 2000
query: UPDATE EMP SET SAL = 2000 WHERE ENAME = 'SMITH';

question: 12. Increase all salaries by 10%
query: UPDATE EMP SET SAL = SAL * 1.10;

question: 13. Update department of ALLEN to 20
query: UPDATE EMP SET DEPTNO = 20 WHERE ENAME = 'ALLEN';

question: 14. Update commission of SALESMAN to 500
query: UPDATE EMP SET COMM = 500 WHERE JOB = 'SALESMAN';

question: 15. Update job of MILLER to MANAGER
query: UPDATE EMP SET JOB = 'MANAGER' WHERE ENAME = 'MILLER';

question: 16. Increase salary in Dept 10 by 20%
query: UPDATE EMP SET SAL = SAL * 1.20 WHERE DEPTNO = 10;

question: 17. Update CLERK salary to 1500
query: UPDATE EMP SET SAL = 1500 WHERE JOB = 'CLERK';

question: 18. Update location of Dept 30 to MUMBAI
query: UPDATE DEPT SET LOC = 'MUMBAI' WHERE DEPTNO = 30;

question: 19. Update NULL commission to 100
query: UPDATE EMP SET COMM = 100 WHERE COMM IS NULL;

question: 20. Update salary below average salary
query: UPDATE EMP SET SAL = SAL + 200 WHERE SAL < (SELECT AVG(SAL) FROM EMP);

question: 21. Delete employee SMITH
query: DELETE FROM EMP WHERE ENAME = 'SMITH';

question: 22. Delete all employees in Dept 30
query: DELETE FROM EMP WHERE DEPTNO = 30;

question: 23. Delete salary < 1000
query: DELETE FROM EMP WHERE SAL < 1000;

question: 24. Delete hired before 1981
query: DELETE FROM EMP WHERE HIREDATE < '01-JAN-81';

question: 25. Delete no commission employees
query: DELETE FROM EMP WHERE COMM IS NULL OR COMM = 0;

question: 26. Delete CHICAGO departments
query: DELETE FROM DEPT WHERE LOC = 'CHICAGO';

question: 27. Delete employees with job CLERK
query: DELETE FROM EMP WHERE JOB = 'CLERK';

question: 28. Delete minimum salary earners
query: DELETE FROM EMP WHERE SAL = (SELECT MIN(SAL) FROM EMP);

question: 29. Delete NEW YORK employees
query: DELETE FROM EMP WHERE DEPTNO IN (SELECT DEPTNO FROM DEPT WHERE LOC = 'NEW YORK');

question: 30. Delete where manager is NULL
query: DELETE FROM EMP WHERE MGR IS NULL;
